title: [Kharag 'doth Dzulthu, Tunnels]
description: Several small torches are mounted upon the walls of this large cavern, casting a dim light across the faces of the occupants.  Half a dozen dwarves scurry about, directing passengers aboard a series of mining carts that barely stop long enough to allow entrance.

wayto.1261:
;e fput "buy pass"
waitfor "You hastily exit the cart"
wayto.1267:
;e fput "buy ticket"
waitfor "You hastily exit the cart"
